title: University
description:
I graduated with a Second Upper Honours from the Singapore University of Social Sciences, majoring in Business Analytics with a Minor in Information Technology.

My academic journey focused on Machine Learning and Data Visualisation, where I built a strong foundation in areas such as predictive modelling, clustering and association analysis, deep learning, reinforcement learning, and natural language processing.

Beyond theory, my studies emphasized practical application—bridging data-driven insights with real-world implementation through hands-on projects and technical development.
details: Finalist — SUSS Business Cohort FYP: Contemporary Business Strategy Competition
Teaching Assistant for Selenium Web Scraping

content.text: My final year project involved participating in the Contemporary Business Strategy Competition, where we applied advanced machine learning techniques to real-world business challenges. Our team placed as finalists among top cohorts by developing predictive models that consistently outperformed baseline strategies.

Throughout my degree, I developed deep practical expertise. Moving beyond standard coursework, I implemented reinforcement learning agents for dynamic optimization and utilized NLP to uncover insights from unstructured text data.
